thesis_bull: gold_permanent_overlay is a permanent 10% GLD allocation policy that fires an ENTRY every routine by design — it is crisis/inflation insurance and a near-zero-correlation diversifier to both equities and bonds. The book is flat post the 2026-05-15T00:31:53Z fresh-start reset, so there is no existing GLD exposure; under normal data conditions this would be the first leg re-established (and would ordinarily be subsumed under dual_momentum_taa, which today produced no GLD signal only because price data was unavailable to compute its 12m-return / 10mo-MA confirmations).
thesis_bear: Market data is entirely unavailable at EOD: the yfinance data host is blocked ('Host not in allowlist') and there is no fresh cached fallback — all 25 watchlist symbols returned zero bars, the regime detector degraded to 'uncertain / low' with every indicator null, and the most recent usable daily bar across the system remains 2026-05-08 (7 calendar days stale versus the 60-second max_data_staleness_seconds cap). With no current GLD price there is no defensible entry, stop, target, position size, or fill. Opening blind would violate CLAUDE.md rule #5 (stale data => NO_TRADE) and the capital-preservation mandate. News connector is also offline (all symbols news_unavailable — treated as a risk factor, not as bullish).
invalidation_condition: Market-data feed restored to within data.max_data_staleness_seconds (fresh GLD daily bar at or near the current session close). When data is fresh again at a subsequent EOD, re-evaluate the gold_permanent_overlay ENTRY for a real fill, sized off the primary strategy's allocation per the consolidator, and re-establish the permanent 10% leg.

position_size.sizing_basis: Not computable: no current GLD price. gold_permanent_overlay targets ~10% of the $102,496.62 post-reset account; size cannot be derived without a fresh quote. CB is FULL (throttle 1.0) so the data-staleness gate — not the circuit-breaker — is the binding constraint.

consolidation.note: dual_momentum_taa produced no GLD signal this run solely because price data was unavailable to evaluate its confirmations; under fresh data GLD would normally be subsumed under Strategy A's larger 60% allocation.

confidence_notes: Confidence in the NO_TRADE routing itself is very high (~0.98) — total data unavailability is a mechanical hard gate. The 0.50 reflects neutral confidence in the underlying permanent-overlay thesis: the policy is sound but unverifiable today with no price, regime, or news inputs.
risk_manager_notes: NO_TRADE adds no exposure and reduces no risk; APPROVED on the conservative side. Had this been PAPER_BUY it would be a hard REJECT: market data unavailable for all symbols and most-recent bar 2026-05-08 (>> 60s max_data_staleness_seconds). No valid entry/stop/target derivable; risk-per-trade and position-cap checks are moot without a price. Mechanical data gate fails before any strategic check. Book is flat post-reset; no portfolio interaction.
compliance_notes: GLD is on watchlist.yaml with approved_for_paper_trading=true (max_position_size_pct=60); gold_permanent_overlay is ACTIVE_PAPER_TEST; mode PAPER_TRADING. NO_TRADE recorded for prediction-review traceability and is the correct routing under the data-staleness hard gate. Schema-compliant. No live execution. No protected-file writes. Note: operator intent per 2026-05-15_003153_state_reset.md was BROKER_PAPER=alpaca, but runtime env has BROKER_PAPER unset (=sim); flagged to journal/audit — not a trade-decision blocker since no trade is placed.
